reviews.comment:
Tremendamente tramposos. Les pregunta a si se puede pagar con mercadopago y cuando terminan de cargar te dicen que no se puede. Esas son las cosas que hacen que uno no vuelva más a un lugar

(Translated by Google)
Terribly deceitful. They ask if you can pay with Mercado Pago, and when they finish charging, they tell you it's not possible. Those are the things that make you never come back to a place.

reviews.comment:
Buena la atencion cada vez que voy a la costa lo cargo combustible aca aunque hay playeros que te atienden de mala manera entiendo que todos tenemos problemas pero no hay que llevarlos al trabajo, igual que las cajeras. Siendo dueño en mi trabajo remarco eso la buena atencion al cliente aunque no tenga razon respeto y buena contestacion, entiendo que la mayoria de los porteños contestan o te hablan de mala manera creyendose superiores pero CHICOS no nos metan a todos en la bolsa, deben mejorar ese aspecto de calidez humana

(Translated by Google)
The service is good; every time I go to the coast I fill up here, although some attendants are rude. I understand we all have problems, but you shouldn't bring them to work, just like the cashiers. As the owner of my business, I want to emphasize the importance of good customer service, even when I'm wrong. Respect and a polite response are key. I understand that most people from Buenos Aires speak rudely, thinking they're superior, but guys, don't lump us all together. You need to improve your human touch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURReWRiVFFBEAE
